layoutReads.text: const onResize = () => push('resize', { w: Number(window.innerWidth || 0), h: Number(window.innerHeight || 0) })

scrollWrites.text: try { window.scrollTo({ top: nextY, behavior: 'auto' }) } catch { try { window.scrollTo(0, nextY) } catch {} }
try { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'auto' }) } catch { try { window.scrollTo(0, 0) } catch {} }
try { window.scrollTo({ top: Math.max(0, y), behavior: 'auto' }) } catch { try { window.scrollTo(0, Math.max(0, y)) } catch {} }
try { window.scrollTo({ top: Math.max(0, y), behavior: 'auto' }) } catch { try { window.scrollTo(0, Math.max(0, y)) } catch {} }
try { window.scrollTo({ top: y, behavior: 'auto' }) } catch { try { window.scrollTo(0, y) } catch {} }

layoutReads.text: const parentRect = parent?.getBoundingClientRect?.() || { top: 0, left: 0, right: 0 };
const pRect = parent?.getBoundingClientRect?.() || { left: 0, right: window.innerWidth }
const pRect = parent?.getBoundingClientRect?.() || { left: 0, right: window.innerWidth }
